text.text: Syrmorite serves as an excellent casting material. Pour molten Syrmorite over any tool part on a Casting Table to obtain a permanent, reusable cast—identical to those made from gold.
The Syrmorite Fluid Tank can also passively collect Molten Sulfur. Place a Sulfur block atop it and wait for rain; the water dissolves the Sulfur, storing the resulting liquid directly in the tank.
This Molten Sulfur serves as a potent liquid fuel for the Smeltery, offering an alternative to lava.
